description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly gray and black color scheme accented by blue highlights. The body is angular and robust, with a full stock and a prominent carry handle integrated above the receiver. The magazine is curved and detachable, positioned just in front of the trigger guard, and also features blue accents. The barrel is short and thick, with a cylindrical muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is elongated and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban tactical firearms.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a gray and black body, blue accents, a full stock, and a curved magazine. It features a short barrel, ergonomic grip, and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the cylindrical muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, including the carry handle, curved magazine, blue highlights, and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the butt of the stock and the alignment of the carry handle, with minimal detail visible on the barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the full stock, magazine, and blue accents, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and squared, providing ample space and a robust appearance
